wins: Highest TCV and ACV ever booked at $2.3 billion and $684 million
Rule of 40 score reached 94%, up 11 points quarter-over-quarter
risks: Seasonal ramp in expenses expected in Q3
Revenue from strategic commercial contracts is expected to be less than half of 1% of full year revenue
Uncertainty around future demand for AI-powered software capabilities
Potential challenges in maintaining growth rates in the back half of the year
Competition from hyperscaler stacks and other AI providers
